scripts.dev: npm run guard:local && npm run free:dev-ports && concurrently "npm --prefix frontend run dev:safe" "npm --prefix backend run dev"
scripts.dev:backend: npm run guard:local && npm --prefix backend run dev
scripts.dev:frontend: npm run guard:local && npm --prefix frontend run dev:safe
scripts.dev:all: npm run guard:local && npm run free:dev-ports && concurrently "npm --prefix frontend run dev:safe" "npm --prefix backend run dev"
scripts.start: npm run guard:local && cd backend && node server.js
scripts.install:all: npm run guard:local && npm install && npm --prefix frontend install --include=dev && npm --prefix frontend run prepare-assets && cd backend && npm install
scripts.build: npm run guard:local && npm --prefix frontend install --include=dev && npm --prefix frontend run prepare-assets && npm --prefix frontend run build && npm --prefix backend install
